summary: Full Stack Engineer leading the modernisation of a legacy Microsoft Access and ASP.NET MVC system into a clean, scalable architecture using .NET 10 and Angular 21. Responsible for end-to-end delivery across backend API design, frontend SPA development, database migration, and CI/CD without disrupting live business operations.
techStack: .NET 10, Angular 21, TypeScript, PrimeNG, Clean Architecture, CQRS, MediatR, Dapper, SQL Server, Microsoft Entra ID (MSAL), Azure OpenAI, GitHub Actions, xUnit, Vitest, Playwright, IIS, Windows Server
experiences: Modernising a legacy Microsoft Access and ASP.NET MVC system into a scalable architecture using .NET 10 and Angular 21, replacing an outdated UI with a performant, component-driven SPA built on PrimeNG.
Architecting a Clean Architecture backend with domain driven design, CQRS/MediatR patterns, and Dapper with structured separation across Domain, Application, Infrastructure, and API layers.
Migrating and re-platforming an MSSQL database, preserving live integrations with XERO, Power BI, and active stored procedures without disrupting business operations.
Designing RESTful APIs secured with Microsoft Entra ID (MSAL), replacing direct database access patterns to improve maintainability and enable future integrations.
Establishing CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions with automated build, test (xUnit + Vitest), and deployment workflows targeting a Windows Server IIS environment.
Leading end-to-end modernisation strategy from legacy system analysis to greenfield architecture delivering full stack features including AI-powered job search using Azure OpenAI.

summary: Software Developer delivering Angular and .NET solutions for healthcare operations, with a focus on secure API integration, role-based access control, and automated testing. Also built Power Platform workflows to digitise internal processes and reduce manual overhead.

experiences: Migrated Angular applications to v21 using signals, reactive forms, and standalone components with lazy loading for improved performance.
Implemented caching strategies and HTTP interceptors for optimised API calls and error handling across frontend and backend layers.
Applied role-based access controls (RBAC) and audit logging to support secure handling of sensitive healthcare data with full traceability.
Integrated with external systems including the Australian Immunisation Register (AIR) via REST APIs using Auth0 secured authentication and token-based authorization.
Developed Power Automate flows for approvals, notifications, and system updates to improve turnaround times.
Established error logging and monitoring pipelines with structured exception handling to track system health and security events.
Cut regression testing time by 40% by introducing Playwright E2E automation in Azure DevOps pipelines.

experiences: Built and enhanced responsive sales funnels for mobile, broadband, and energy services, helping boost conversion rates by 12% and contributing to stronger customer acquisition.

Delivered UX and performance improvements that reduced support call volumes by 15–20% and helped improve customer retention through a smoother online experience.
Mentored junior developers and actively contributed to design discussions on scalability, accessibility, and frontend best practices.

summary: Software Developer building and maintaining university-scale e-learning platforms and serverless applications, integrating .NET and AWS-based solutions.
